def positive_duplicate_items_silently_dropped_without_contract_signal():
    rule_id = "duplicate_items_silently_dropped_without_contract_signal"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that deduplicates caller data without making that behavior explicit."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
